name: Hot Spicy Chicken Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, halves, broiler/fryer, boned, skinned, cut into 1/2 inch strips
Salsa and cheddar cheese for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, heat the olive oil over medium flame.
2. Add the chicken strips to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes until the chicken is brown on all sides.
3. Add onion, garlic, yellow squash, green pepper, and red pepper to the pan. Stir in Cajun seasoning, hot pepper sauce, chili powder, lime juice, paprika, and ground pepper.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for an additional 10 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp tender.
5. Spoon about half a cup of the chicken mixture onto each tortilla.
6. Roll up the tortillas tightly and arrange them on a serving platter.
7. Garnish with salsa and shredded cheddar cheese.
